name: premium-site-tools
description: Tools for building premium cinematic marketing websites with Claude Code — complete sites from empty folders with Next.js, Tailwind CSS, GSAP, QA, and localhost preview.

plugins.name: premium-site-factory
plugins.description: Build complete premium cinematic company websites from empty folders — Next.js, Tailwind CSS, GSAP, per-industry visual theses with an anti-clone QA pass, a mandatory ACTIVE video experience on every site (hero autoplay and/or scroll-driven; Replicate or procedural ffmpeg), an optional consent-gated soundtrack (MiniMax Music), build validation, secret scan, and localhost preview.
